title: multi rainbow Clockel and Sahaquiel
wikitext:
[]: multi-rainbow Clockel & Sahaquiel             Quote Post by Deyno » Thu Nov 17, 2011 9:32 pm we know that in Rebuild the angels when they die they leave a rainbow but... Why Sahaquiel and Clockel leave more than one?

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Nov 17, 2011 10:38 pm Reminds me of this. Probably just to be pretty.

[]:             Quote Post by Seele00TextOnly » Fri Nov 18, 2011 9:12 am ...

[]:             Quote Post by Deyno » Fri Nov 18, 2011 10:01 am aesthetics is a possibility, but there is also another theory try again

[]: Uh, dude? B/             Quote Post by Alaska Slim » Fri Nov 18, 2011 10:07 am ^ If you know there's another theory, why don't you just say it? People shouldn't have to tell you, what you are thinking. I see usage as halos, both as the kind you see in depictions of saints, and the standard horizontal ones. There might be more, but I haven't a clue what that could be.
